alBranchController , MultiwayBranchController public abstract class AbstractBranchController extends java.lang.Object implements Debuggable This is a base class containing the common code for controllers that manage branches for performing condition

ers that manage branches for performing conditional or multiway rendezvous within the CSP (Communication Sequential Processes) domain. Any CSP actors (either atomic or composite) that multiway rendezvous should contain an instance of this class.
